title: The Lion and the Mouse
description: Kindness pays back. A beginner-friendly fable.

segments.text: A lion is sleeping in the forest.
A small mouse runs over his paw.
The lion wakes up and catches the mouse.
The mouse says, “Please let me go.
One day I will help you.” The lion laughs but lets him go.
Later, the lion is caught in a hunter's net.
The mouse chews the rope and frees the lion.
Small friends can be great friends.

transcript: A lion is sleeping in the forest. A small mouse runs over his paw. The lion wakes up and catches the mouse. The mouse says, “Please let me go. One day I will help you.” The lion laughs but lets him go. Later, the lion is caught in a hunter's net. The little mouse hears him. The mouse chews the rope and frees the lion. Small friends can be great friends.
